paper_title: In Vitro Germination Capability of Apocynacean Pollen

methods.description: Process for collecting and preparing pollen grains from Apocynacean members for in vitro germination analysis.

steps.description: Mature pollen grains were collected soon after anther dehiscence from freshly opened flower buds preferably of same age to obtain uniformity in result, just before anthesis.
steps.searchable_summary: collect mature pollen grains from freshly opened flower buds

steps.description: Surface sterilization of the mature anthers was done in 10% sodium hypochlorite solution.
steps.searchable_summary: sterilize mature anthers using sodium hypochlorite solution

steps.description: Pre-hydration of pollen grains was done since pollen grains are essentially in arrested developmental stage therefore high humidity essentially improves germination.
steps.searchable_summary: pre-hydrate pollen grains to improve germination

methods.description: Procedure for assessing the in vitro germination of pollen grains using the hanging drop method and specific culture media.

steps.description: In vitro germination was assessed using the hanging drop method.
steps.searchable_summary: assess in vitro germination using hanging drop method

steps.description: The grains were transferred to microslides containing culture media in solution (Brewbaker's media, 6% Glucose solution, 4% Calcium Nitrate solution and 3% Boron solution).
steps.searchable_summary: transfer pollen grains to culture media on microslides

steps.description: Pollen density was kept at optimal level to avoid population effect and from getting the nutrients as a limiting factor.
steps.searchable_summary: maintain optimal pollen density in culture media

steps.description: The pollen tube growth was arrested after desired period of time by adding Formaldehyde: Glacial Acetic Acid: 70% Ethanol= 5:5:90 v/v.
steps.searchable_summary: arrest pollen tube growth using chemical solution

steps.description: Average pollen germination is measured after specified time. 5-10 different fields were selected arbitrarily for observing the overall germination rates under different treatments at 1, 2 and 3 hours respectively.
steps.searchable_summary: measure average pollen germination rates at specified times
